title: teucrium collincola
intro: Teucrium collincola, also known as the mountain tea or wild hyacinth, is a flowering plant species in the genus Teucrium. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help in relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Teucrium collincola include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and even help in treating anxiety and insomnia. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Teucrium collincola are typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
